title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
